elements.customCode: <style>html,body{margin:0;height:100%;background:transparent;overflow:hidden;user-select:none}canvas{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;cursor:crosshair;touch-action:none}</style><canvas id=c></canvas><script>var c=document.getElementById('c'),x=c.getContext('2d'),D=Math.min(devicePixelRatio||1,2);var N=16,pts=[];for(var i=0;i<N;i++){pts.push(0.5+0.32*Math.sin(i*0.9)+0.12*Math.sin(i*2.3));}for(var i=0;i<N;i++){pts[i]=Math.max(0.05,Math.min(0.95,pts[i]));}var W,H;function sz(){W=c.clientWidth;H=c.clientHeight;c.width=W*D;c.height=H*D;x.setTransform(D,0,0,D,0,0);}sz();addEventListener('resize',sz);var drag=-1;function idxAt(px){return Math.max(0,Math.min(N-1,Math.round((px/W)*(N-1))));}function setP(e){var r=c.getBoundingClientRect();var px=e.clientX-r.left,py=e.clientY-r.top;if(drag<0)drag=idxAt(px);pts[drag]=Math.max(0.05,Math.min(0.95,1-py/H));}c.addEventListener('pointerdown',function(e){e.stopPropagation();drag=idxAt(e.clientX-c.getBoundingClientRect().left);setP(e);try{c.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)}catch(_){}});c.addEventListener('pointermove',function(e){if(drag>=0)setP(e);});c.addEventListener('pointerup',function(){drag=-1;});c.addEventListener('pointercancel',function(){drag=-1;});var t=0;function loop(){t+=0.016;x.clearRect(0,0,W,H);var sw=W/(N-1);x.strokeStyle='rgba(255,70,55,.85)';x.lineWidth=2;x.shadowColor='rgba(255,40,40,.5)';x.shadowBlur=6;x.beginPath();for(var i=0;i<N;i++){var cx=i*sw,cy=(1-pts[i])*H;if(i===0)x.moveTo(cx,cy);else x.lineTo(cx,cy);}x.stroke();x.shadowBlur=0;for(var i=0;i<N;i++){var cx=i*sw,cy=(1-pts[i])*H;x.fillStyle='#ff4444';x.shadowColor='#ff2b2b';x.shadowBlur=5;x.beginPath();x.arc(cx,cy,3.2,0,7);x.fill();x.shadowBlur=0;}var ph=(t*1.4)%(N-1),px=ph*sw;x.strokeStyle='rgba(255,150,150,.9)';x.lineWidth=2;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(px,0);x.lineTo(px,H);x.stroke();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}loop();</script>
